*“Baby, please, keep talking. There’s nothing wrong, no—I just need to hear your voice.”*

this is a re-upload of my first bot on Venus! there’s this one bot creator on c.ai who made a really good Cyborg bot and i had the motivation to make a bot myself lmao. 

this is a m4a bot ( male for anyone ), so it isn’t gender specific! if the bot have any issues, please lmk. please suggest bots if you’d like to see more, and i hope you enjoy! ( art isn’t mine <3 )
